themes.title: Far-right parties push 'national priority' policies
themes.blurb: Right-wing and far-right parties across Europe are increasingly advocating for 'national priority' policies, which prioritize citizens over immigrants in public services and benefits. This theme is evident in Spain, France, and Italy, where parties like Vox, Rassemblement National, and Lega are pushing for similar measures, often clashing with EU regulations and left-wing opposition.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Criticizes PP and PSOE for not prioritizing Spaniards in public services, demands national priority in aid and healthcare.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: Advocates for French citizens' priority in housing and social benefits, opposing immigration policies.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Proposes policies to prioritize Italian citizens in public services, often clashing with EU migration policies.

countries.name: 🇵🇱 Prawo i Sprawiedliwość
countries.note: President Nawrocki vetoes laws that could weaken state control over agricultural land, emphasizing national sovereignty.

countries.name: 🇩🇪 Alternative für Deutschland
countries.note: Calls for stricter immigration controls and prioritization of German citizens in public services.

themes.title: Trump’s policies dominate global right-wing coverage
themes.blurb: Donald Trump's policies and rhetoric continue to shape right-wing discourse globally, with his administration's actions—such as rejecting Iran's peace proposal, launching new initiatives, and influencing international relations—being widely covered by right-wing media in the U.S., Poland, Italy, and beyond. His influence extends to domestic policies in countries where right-wing parties align with his vision.

countries.name: 🇺🇸 MAGA / Trump
countries.note: Trump's rejection of Iran's peace proposal and his administration's policies on immigration, trade, and energy dominate U.S. right-wing media.

countries.name: 🇵🇱 Prawo i Sprawiedliwość
countries.note: Covers Trump's influence on Polish politics, including his role in securing the release of Polish prisoners and shaping U.S.-Poland relations.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Reports on Trump's policies, particularly his stance on NATO, immigration, and trade, which resonate with Italy's right-wing agenda.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Aligns with Trump's anti-immigration and nationalist rhetoric, influencing UK right-wing discourse.

countries.name: 🇦🇷 La Libertad Avanza
countries.note: Javier Milei's alignment with Trump's economic policies and rhetoric is frequently highlighted in Argentine right-wing media.

themes.title: Reform UK’s electoral surge reshapes UK politics
themes.blurb: Reform UK's recent electoral gains have significantly disrupted the UK's political landscape, challenging both Labour and the Conservatives. The party's success in local elections, particularly in traditional Labour strongholds, reflects growing voter dissatisfaction with mainstream parties and a shift toward nationalist and anti-immigration policies.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Reform UK gains over 1,400 council seats, reshaping local politics and challenging Labour's dominance in traditional strongholds.

countries.name: 🇺🇸 MAGA / Trump
countries.note: Trump's influence on Reform UK's policies and rhetoric is frequently highlighted in U.S. right-wing media.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Covers Reform UK's rise as part of a broader trend of right-wing electoral success in Europe.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: Compares Reform UK's success to its own electoral strategies and nationalist policies.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Analyzes Reform UK's electoral gains as a model for right-wing parties in Spain.

themes.title: Corruption scandals rock far-right governments
themes.blurb: Corruption allegations are increasingly undermining far-right governments and parties across multiple countries. In Argentina, Hungary, Poland, and Spain, scandals involving high-ranking officials have sparked public outrage and internal divisions, threatening the stability of these administrations.

countries.name: 🇦🇷 La Libertad Avanza
countries.note: Manuel Adorni faces allegations of illicit enrichment, sparking internal divisions within Javier Milei's government.

countries.name: 🇭🇺 Fidesz / Tisza
countries.note: Former Fidesz officials face corruption charges, while the new Tisza government promises to address past abuses.

countries.name: 🇵🇱 Prawo i Sprawiedliwość
countries.note: Zbigniew Ziobro's flight to the U.S. amid corruption charges highlights ongoing scandals within the party.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Accuses PP and PSOE of corruption, particularly in pandemic-era bailouts and public contracts.

countries.name: 🇺🇸 MAGA / Trump
countries.note: Trump's administration faces scrutiny over financial dealings and alleged corruption, influencing global right-wing discourse.

themes.title: Hungary’s political transition dominates coverage
themes.blurb: Hungary's political transition from Viktor Orbán's Fidesz government to Péter Magyar's Tisza Party has captured significant attention in right-wing and far-right media. The shift is framed as a potential turning point for Hungary's domestic policies and its relationship with the EU, with global implications for right-wing movements.

countries.name: 🇭🇺 Fidesz / Tisza
countries.note: Péter Magyar's swearing-in as prime minister marks the end of Orbán's 16-year rule, with promises to address corruption and restore EU relations.

countries.name: 🇺🇸 MAGA / Trump
countries.note: Covers Hungary's transition as part of broader shifts in global right-wing politics, including Trump's influence on Orbán.

countries.name: 🇵🇱 Prawo i Sprawiedliwość
countries.note: Analyzes Hungary's transition in the context of Poland's own political shifts and right-wing alliances.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Reports on Hungary's transition as a potential model or cautionary tale for Italy's right-wing coalition.

countries.name: 🇸🇰 General (Slovakia)
countries.note: Compares Hungary's transition to Slovakia's political dynamics under Robert Fico.
